name: clawhunter-skills
description: Official Claw Hunter agent skills — discover and vet Pump Fun GO bounties, and produce the content to win them, via the clawhunter.fun API.
author: clawhunter

skills.description: Find, vet, and work Pump Fun GO bounties: free AI-triaged feed + capability match, and paid creator payout-history + project-legitimacy research. Each bounty returns createWith — the create-tool calls (see clawhunter-content-studio) that produce its deliverable. Free discovery; research settles in USDC on Solana via x402.

Give an agent a real voice and finished media: model a reusable voice tone sampled from any X account (or a description) and write/restyle in it; generate images grounded in a real logo/mascot; produce paste-ready short-form video direction (Veo/Kling shot lists); plus tweets, replies, and threads. Works standalone or grounded in a Pump Fun bounty. Free tone presets; generation settles in USDC on Solana via x402.
